title: Stocktake Report Artifact
description: Implement a new 'stocktake-report' artifact type for the AI assistant that displays inventory status with visual indicators for low stock (yellow) and negative stock (red), including summary statistics for inventory health at a glance.
why: Enable warehouse managers and accountants to quickly assess inventory health through AI-generated visual reports, identifying problem items (out-of-stock, negative stock) at a glance without manual spreadsheet analysis.

tasks.title: Define StocktakeReportItem interface
tasks.description: Create StocktakeReportItem interface in types.ts with fields: code (string), description (string), stockOnHand (number). Place after LedgerReportData section around line 426.
tasks.reference: TrialBalanceItem interface at line 167 - similar simple structure

tasks.title: Define StocktakeReportData interface
tasks.description: Create StocktakeReportData interface with: companyName (string, optional), reportDate (string), currency (string, optional), items (StocktakeReportItem[]), summary (optional object with totalItems, zeroStockCount, negativeStockCount). Place after StocktakeReportItem.
tasks.reference: TrialBalanceData at line 177 - similar structure with items array and summary fields

tasks.title: Add 'stocktake-report' to ArtifactType union
tasks.description: Add '| "stocktake-report"' to the ArtifactType union at line 24 (after 'department-pnl').

tasks.title: Add StocktakeReportData to ArtifactData union
tasks.description: Add '| StocktakeReportData' to the ArtifactData union at line 510 (after DepartmentPnLData).

tasks.title: Create isStocktakeReportData type guard
tasks.description: Create type guard function: export function isStocktakeReportData(data: ArtifactData): data is StocktakeReportData. Check for 'items' array and 'reportDate' field. Place after isDepartmentPnLData at line 584.

tasks.title: Create StocktakeReport React component
tasks.description: Create stocktake-report.tsx component with: Card wrapper, header with company name and report date, table with Code/Description/Stock On Hand columns, row-level background colors (yellow for stockOnHand === 0, red for stockOnHand < 0), summary statistics footer. Use defensive coding: items = data.items || [].
tasks.reference: trial-balance.tsx for table layout, department-pnl.tsx for defensive coding pattern

tasks.title: Register component in artifact-renderer.tsx
tasks.description: Update artifact-renderer.tsx: (1) Import StocktakeReportData and isStocktakeReportData from types, (2) Import StocktakeReport component, (3) Add case 'stocktake-report' with defensive rendering pattern (cast as StocktakeReportData without strict type guard, like department-pnl).
tasks.reference: department-pnl case at line 139-143 - defensive casting pattern

tasks.title: Run TypeScript type check
tasks.description: Execute 'bun run typecheck' from repository root to verify all type definitions compile correctly. Fix any type errors before proceeding.

acceptanceCriteria.description: StocktakeReportData interface defined in types.ts with items array (code, description, stockOnHand), company name, report date, and optional summary statistics
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: StocktakeReportItem and StocktakeReportData interfaces added to types.ts lines 496-537. Includes code, description, stockOnHand fields plus optional summary with totalItems, zeroStockCount, negativeStockCount, totalStock.

acceptanceCriteria.description: 'stocktake-report' added to ArtifactType union in types.ts
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Added '| "stocktake-report"' to ArtifactType union at line 25 in types.ts

acceptanceCriteria.description: isStocktakeReportData() type guard function implemented in types.ts
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Type guard function added at line 631. Checks for 'items' array and 'reportDate' field. Verified working with bun test script.

acceptanceCriteria.description: StocktakeReport React component created in components/artifacts/stocktake-report.tsx with table layout showing Code, Description, Stock On Hand columns
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: New file created at packages/ai/app/components/artifacts/stocktake-report.tsx with table containing Code, Description, Stock On Hand columns

acceptanceCriteria.description: Visual indicators implemented: yellow background for zero stock (out of stock), red background for negative stock
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: getStockRowClass() function returns amber/yellow classes for stockOnHand === 0 and red classes for stockOnHand < 0. Summary cards also highlight counts with matching colors.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Summary statistics displayed: total items count, items with zero stock count, items with negative stock count
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Summary grid displays totalItems, zeroStockCount (Out of Stock), negativeStockCount (Negative Stock), and totalStock. Auto-calculates if not provided in data.

acceptanceCriteria.description: artifact-renderer.tsx updated with 'stocktake-report' case using defensive coding pattern (similar to department-pnl)
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Added import for StocktakeReportData type and StocktakeReport component. Added case 'stocktake-report' at line 147 with defensive casting pattern (data as StocktakeReportData).

decisions.description: Used defensive coding pattern (data.items || []) to handle AI-generated data that may have missing fields
decisions.rationale: Following the established pattern from department-pnl.tsx to ensure robustness with varying AI output

decisions.description: Added auto-calculation of summary statistics if not provided
decisions.rationale: Makes the component more flexible - can work with minimal data from AI while still showing useful statistics

learnings.description: Pre-existing bun-types conflicts in monorepo don't affect runtime - focus on functional testing over strict tsc

referenceImplementations.reason: Defensive coding pattern for AI-generated data
Simple table layout with visual status indicators
